figures.caption: Figure 3: AI Readiness scan results showing the 5-category score breakdown, letter grade, and prioritized recommendations for improvement.

Figure 1: Workstream system architecture. The browser communicates with FastAPI over HTTP and SSE. Six feature modules poll external APIs and persist state in SQLite. Arrows indicate data flow direction.
Figure 2: Workstream dashboard in dark mode. The singlepage interface shows PRs, calendar, sprint tracking, and status cards simultaneously.
